name: Henan Provincial Communications Planning & Design Institute Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Provincial Communications Planning & Design Institute Co., Ltd. undertakes highway and municipal engineering projects in the Asia-Pacific, Africa, and Latin America. It constructs road and bridge, building, tunnel and underground, traffic and logistics, marine traffic, and international engineering projects, as well as offers comprehensive traffic planning, project supervision, inspection and reinforce, project survey and mapping, and digital image services. The company was founded in 1964 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
